title: 8th Birthday 12" Multicoloured Numbers Printed Latex Age Balloons, Digit 8 for Girls Boys 8 Year Old Decorations, 8th Anniversary Party (Pack of 10)
features: Set of 10 multicoloured latex balloons with number print
Diameter: approx. 30.4 cm (12 inches) when inflated
Delivered uninflated: Suitable for helium or air filling
Perfect for celebrations: Ideal for birthdays, parties, anniversaries and other occasions
Colourful and decorative: Brings festive spirits and fun to any celebration
description: Product description Celebrate special moments with these 10 multicoloured latex balloons with number prints! Each balloon reaches a diameter of approx. 30.4 cm (12 inches) when inflated, making them perfect for birthdays, parties, anniversaries or other festive occasions. The balloons are supplied uninflated and can be filled with helium or air as desired. Made from high-quality latex, they are sturdy, durable and easy to handle. Add special accents with these colourful number balloons, display birthday or anniversary numbers creatively and bring fun, colour and unforgettable atmosphere to any celebration. Safety Warning 3+
